updates.title: Streamlining the Census Bureau's Foreign Trade Regulations
updates.summary: By this rule, the Census Bureau is amending its foreign trade regulations by consolidating and streamlining certain cross-references to, and restatements of, other regulations and authorities. This action is intended to simplify and streamline the foreign trade regulations, and thereby promote efficiency, without affecting any substantive obligations or entitlements.

updates.title: Board of Directors Meeting
updates.summary: Notice of the forthcoming regular meeting of the Board of Directors of the Farm Credit System Insurance Corporation (FCSIC), is hereby given in accordance with the provisions of the Bylaws of the FCSIC.

updates.title: Notice of Intent To Request Revision and Extension of a Currently Approved Information Collection
updates.summary: In accordance with the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995, this notice announces the intent of the National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) to request revision and extension of a currently approved information collection, the Livestock Slaughter Survey. Revision to burden hours may be needed due to changes in the size of the target population, sampling design, and/or questionnaire length.

updates.title: Filing of Plats of Survey and Supplemental Plat; New Mexico; Oklahoma
updates.summary: The plats of survey and the supplemental plat of the following described lands are scheduled to be officially filed in the Bureau of Land Management (BLM) New Mexico State Office, Santa Fe, New Mexico. The surveys and plat announced in this notice are necessary for the management of these lands.
